text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: danfe

Log:
  Resurrect `x11-wm/wmx' port removed by kris@ on Feb 18, 2005.  It is still
  well alive, with the latest version released last year.  Submitter assumes
  maintainership.

  PR:	199977 (modified)
